name: nostr-tools
what_it_does: The foundational JavaScript/TypeScript toolkit for Nostr: event creation and signing, relay connections, NIP-19 encoding, and key management. The default starting point for most Nostr web clients.

name: @nostr-dev-kit/ndk
what_it_does: A higher-level Nostr Development Kit that manages relay pools, subscriptions, caching, and signers so app developers can work with Nostr data without hand-rolling relay logic.

name: @atproto/api
what_it_does: The official AT Protocol (Bluesky) client SDK for JavaScript/TypeScript: agents, session management, and typed access to the com.atproto and app.bsky lexicons.

name: nostr
what_it_does: The rust-nostr core crate: a high-performance, no-std-friendly implementation of Nostr primitives — events, keys, NIPs — used by relays, signers, and native clients.

name: github.com/nbd-wtf/go-nostr
what_it_does: The most widely used Go library for Nostr: event handling, relay pools, and NIP helpers. The backbone of many relays and backend services.

name: atproto
what_it_does: A complete, typed AT Protocol / Bluesky SDK for Python, including firehose consumption and lexicon-generated models.

name: @noble/curves
what_it_does: Audited, zero-dependency elliptic-curve cryptography (secp256k1, ed25519, and more). The signing foundation under most Nostr key handling.

name: @scure/base
what_it_does: Audited, zero-dependency base encodings (bech32, base58, base64). Used for NIP-19 (npub/nsec) and address encoding across freedom-tech stacks.

name: astro
what_it_does: A content-first web framework that ships zero JavaScript by default. Ideal for fast, accessible sites and documentation — this catalog runs on it.

name: @astrojs/starlight
what_it_does: A full-featured documentation theme for Astro with built-in search, i18n, and accessibility. The framework powering this catalog's interface.

name: typescript
what_it_does: A typed superset of JavaScript that catches errors before runtime. The lingua franca of the Nostr and AT Protocol JS ecosystems.

name: vite
what_it_does: A fast build tool and dev server with instant HMR. The default bundler under Astro, SvelteKit, and most modern web clients.

name: zod
what_it_does: TypeScript-first schema validation with static type inference. Used here to validate every catalog entry's frontmatter at build time.

name: vitest
what_it_does: A fast, Vite-native unit test runner with a Jest-compatible API. The default test framework for modern TypeScript projects.

name: eslint
what_it_does: A pluggable linter that enforces code quality and catches bugs statically. A baseline quality gate for any shippable codebase.

name: AnythingLLM
what_it_does: An all-in-one, self-hostable orchestration and RAG application: connect bring-your-own local (Ollama, LM Studio) or independent cloud models, with workspaces, document pipelines, multi-user support, and agent/MCP wiring. A BYO-agent cockpit, not a model itself.

name: mdk-core
what_it_does: Marmot Development Kit (MDK) core — a simplified Rust interface for building secure, end-to-end-encrypted group messaging on Nostr with the MLS protocol. The cryptographic engine used by White Noise's Rust core.

name: mdk-macros
what_it_does: Shared declarative macros for the Marmot Development Kit (MDK) workspace — the Rust toolkit for MLS-over-Nostr encrypted group messaging.

name: mdk-memory-storage
what_it_does: An in-memory storage backend for the Marmot Development Kit (MDK) that implements its MdkStorageProvider trait — handy for tests and ephemeral MLS-over-Nostr group state.

name: mdk-sqlite-storage
what_it_does: A SQLite-backed storage backend for the Marmot Development Kit (MDK) that implements its MdkStorageProvider trait, persisting MLS-over-Nostr group state to disk.

name: mdk-storage-traits
what_it_does: The storage-abstraction traits for the Marmot Development Kit (MDK), wrapping OpenMLS storage backends so MDK can persist MLS group state across different databases.

name: whitenoise-macros
what_it_does: Internal macros for whitenoise-rs, the Rust core ('the Rust brain') of the White Noise encrypted group-messaging client for Nostr. Published only within the White Noise workspace.

name: @internet-privacy/marmot-ts
what_it_does: A TypeScript implementation of the Marmot protocol — MLS-based, end-to-end-encrypted group messaging over Nostr — published as @internet-privacy/marmot-ts.

name: blossom-client-sdk
what_it_does: A TypeScript client SDK for talking to Blossom servers — the HTTP protocol for storing and fetching blobs (media) on Nostr media servers, addressed by their hash. Used to handle media in Nostr and Marmot apps.

name: openmls
what_it_does: A Rust implementation of the IETF Messaging Layer Security (MLS) protocol (RFC 9420) — the standard for end-to-end-encrypted group messaging. The MLS foundation the Marmot Development Kit builds on; the same core can carry encrypted groups over Nostr or AT Protocol.

name: openmls_basic_credential
what_it_does: The Basic Credential implementation for OpenMLS — the simple identity-credential type used to establish membership in an MLS group.
